name: Zscaler MCP Server
description: Zscaler MCP Server provides AI-powered management of Zscaler Zero Trust Exchange services including ZIA, ZPA, ZDX, ZCC, ZTW, ZIdentity, EASM, and Z-Insights
long_description: Zscaler MCP Server is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server designed for managing Zscaler products using Large Language Models (LLMs). It supports read-only operations by default with optional write capabilities controlled via allowlists.

tools.name: zscaler_check_connectivity
tools.description: Check connectivity to the Zscaler API

enabled_services.title: Enabled Services
enabled_services.description: Comma-separated list of Zscaler services to enable. Available: zia, zpa, zdx, zcc, ztw, zidentity, zeasm, zinsights. Default: all services enabled.

debug_mode.title: Enable Debug Mode
debug_mode.description: Enable debug logging for troubleshooting. Provides detailed logs of MCP server operations and API interactions.

enable_write_tools.title: Enable Write Tools
enable_write_tools.description: Enable tools that can CREATE, UPDATE, and DELETE Zscaler resources. By default, only read-only tools (list/get) are available.

write_tools.title: Write Tools Allowlist (MANDATORY)
write_tools.description: MANDATORY allowlist of write tools (comma-separated). Supports wildcards (e.g., 'zpa_create_*,zpa_delete_*'). REQUIRED when 'Enable Write Tools' is enabled.

user_agent_comment.title: Custom User Agent
user_agent_comment.description: Optional custom identifier to append to the User-Agent string for API requests.

enabled_tools.title: Enabled Tools
enabled_tools.description: Comma-separated list of specific tools to enable. If not specified, all tools for enabled services will be available.
